topic: The stairwell has one more door at the top than the building has floors.
title: One More Door Than The Building Has Floors | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Our stairwell has one more door at the top than the building has floors.
scenes.image_prompt: A bare concrete stairwell rising steeply, painted floor numbers, a single door at the very top in shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I work in a plain eight floor office building downtown.
scenes.image_prompt: An office building exterior at dusk, eight rows of lit windows, grey sky, faint streetlight glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take the stairs for exercise. Eight flights, every day.
scenes.image_prompt: Looking up a tall stairwell, flights folding back on themselves, harsh single bulbs, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One evening I kept climbing past the eighth floor door.
scenes.image_prompt: A stairwell landing with a door marked eight, more steps continuing upward into dark, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There were more stairs. There should not have been.
scenes.image_prompt: A flight of concrete stairs rising into shadow above a top landing, no window, faint flicker, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the top sat a ninth door, unnumbered, slightly ajar.
scenes.image_prompt: A plain grey door at the top of a stairwell, no number plate, opened a crack to darkness, dim bulb, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I counted floors from the street the next morning. Only eight.
scenes.image_prompt: View up an office building facade from the sidewalk, eight floors of windows, flat roofline, grey light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yet the stairwell always climbed to nine. Always one more.
scenes.image_prompt: A stairwell top landing with an extra door above the highest numbered one, harsh shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I pushed the ninth door. Behind it, the eighth floor office, repeating.
scenes.image_prompt: An open door revealing an office floor identical to the one below, dim and empty, cold light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My own coat hung on my chair, though I still wore mine.
scenes.image_prompt: An office chair with a coat draped over it, empty desk, faint lamp glow, deep shadow around, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I backed out and ran down, counting. I passed nine landings.
scenes.image_prompt: A figure's hand on a stairwell rail descending fast, landings blurring, harsh light from above, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now the stairwell has ten doors. I think I am still up there.
scenes.image_prompt: A very tall stairwell looking up toward many stacked doors fading into darkness, faint top light, vertical 9:16 framing
